principal_diagnosis.evidence_span: probable community-acquired pneumonia — treated as such with a full course of intravenous then oral antibiotics
principal_diagnosis.rationale: Documented as 'probable' at separation but treated as pneumonia, so coded as established (SCS-UNC-01).

additional_diagnoses.rationale: Treated with antibiotics; 'code also' on DX-RESP-010.

not_coded.reason: Only queried, culture negative, not treated — an uncertain diagnosis that was not treated is not coded.

hard_cases_exercised: Uncertain-but-TREATED diagnosis coded as established — SCS-UNC-01 (contrast with EP-0004 negation)
